sub_modules.hp_fir_mac_comb: Combinational floating-point FIR multiply-accumulate over the packed sample history and fixed 101-tap high-pass coefficients.
sub_modules.hp_valid_delay: Combinational valid extraction helper for a top-managed valid pipeline.
sub_modules.hp_sample_packer: Combinational pass-through packing boundary for sample history words.
sub_modules.hp_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the exact binary32 high-pass FIR coefficient words.
